title: Executive Order on Strengthening Domestic Critical Minerals Supply Chains
content: The President signed an executive order directing federal agencies to invoke Defense Production Act authorities to accelerate domestic production of critical minerals, establish a strategic minerals reserve, and prioritize permitting for qualifying projects. Agencies have 90 days to submit implementation plans.

title: Presidential Memorandum on Interagency Coordination for Mineral Supply Chain Resilience
content: The memorandum establishes an interagency working group tasked with coordinating permitting reviews across the Department of the Interior, EPA, and Department of Energy for projects deemed critical to mineral supply chain resilience.
